heading: Behavior
body:
[$source](pipe.$source) must be the first stage of any pipeline it appears
in. You can use only one [$source](pipe.$source) stage per pipeline.

For Kafka `$source` stages, Atlas Stream Processing reads in parallel from
multiple partitions within the source topic. The partition limit is
determined by your processor tier. To learn more, see the [Stream Processing billing reference](atlas-sp-processor-billing).
